title: Ctenopteris purpurascens
taxonomy: Ctenopteris purpurascens is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a genus of ferns that are native to New Zealand. The family Dryopteridaceae is a group of ferns commonly known as wood ferns. This group consists of about 1,200 species of ferns that are distributed across the world. Ctenopteris purpurascens is one of the many species within this family.
